title: SQL: time zone does not have effect on now()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, event_time DATETIME NOT NULL, user_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, e.event_time FROM users u JOIN events e ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE e.event_time > DATETIME('now', '-1 day');
key_bug_features: now() function ignores time zone settings
